TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Buner Itiniay i Ji'an Cen no Hualien ko Buner a niyaro', 1,710 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 4,775 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 24% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 1,133 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 76% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 3,642 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 21%, Truku 1%, Bunun 1%. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'.
S.PHON: b~b~vo~u~un…ôr itiniaj i *i °an ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u b~b~vo~u~un…ôr a nijaro~u °, *,*** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *,*** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis **%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: Buner Itiniay i Ji'an Cen no Hualien ko Buner a niyaro', 1,710 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 4,775 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 24% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 1,133 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 76% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 3,642 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 21%, Truku 1%, Bunun 1%. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'.
S.PHON: b~b~vo~u~un…ôr itiniaj i *i °an ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u b~b~vo~u~un…ôr a nijaro~u °, *,*** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *,*** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis **%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~u °.
